name: Steve Chabot Press
subject: Is Kamala Harris Really a Moderate?
body:
Let her record speak for itself... No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jkkttuut-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkkttuut-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkkttuut-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [So is Kamala Harris Really a Moderate?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkkttuut-kujkulhluu-j/)
The mainstream press has their marching orders and have shifted into full gear trying to paint Biden's Vice-Presidential pick, Kamala Harris, as a moderate. In this week's blog, we examine Harris' record, and what we find will unequivocally answer the question - is Kamala Harris really a moderate? [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkkttuut-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkkttuut-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Biden Picks Kamala. The Unconventions. And Biden Makes Another Racist Comment.](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkkttuut-kujkulhluu-d/)
Last night, the Biden campaign confirmed he is choosing Senator Kamala Harris to be his running mate. To many this was no surprise. However, what is surprising is just a few months ago, in the Democratic debate, Harris confronted Biden about having worked with segregationists in the Senate and discussed her personal history with busing. In this week's blog I discuss Biden's selection, the upcoming national conventions for both parties and yet another racially insensitive comment from basement Joe! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkkttuut-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkkttuut-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Will They or Won't They Debate? ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkkttuut-kujkulhluu-u/)
The mainstream press is at it again, highlighting polls that favor Joe Biden and practically declaring Biden the winner of the upcoming presidential election. Many Trump supporters believe that the great equalizer will be face-to-face debates, however, many in the media are already casting doubt on these already scheduled debates. In this week's blog, I discuss if these debates will actually happen and I have a follow-up from last week's blog about what happens if the Democrats win the trifecta of the House, Senate and Presidency. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkkttuut-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkkttuut-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [If the Democrats Win](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkkttuut-kujkulhluu-n/)
We're a little less than 100 days from this year's election. People are saying, this could be the most important election of our lifetime. A bit cliche? Not this time. The reality is, the House, the Senate and the Presidency are all at stake. In this week's blog, I discuss what will happen if the Democrats sweep the election. God help us. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkkttuut-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkkttuut-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkkttuut-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkkttuut-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkkttuut-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkkttuut-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkkttuut-kujkulhluu-f/)
---|---|---

body:
Congratulations Kamala Harris! | | | |
---

---
| | |
### Friends,

Tonight, Democratic Vice Presidential Candidate Kamala Harris described the vision of America that she was raised with and her plan to turn our challenges into purpose with Joe Biden as President.

′′I am committed to the values my mother taught me, to the word that teaches me to walk by faith, and not by sight, and to a vision passed on through generations of Americans—one that Joe Biden shares. A vision of our nation as a beloved community–where all are welcome, no matter what we look like, where we come from, or who we love."

name: Kara Eastman
subject: what Kamala and I share
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eastman for Congress
body:
|
---

| | I'm honored that Kamala Harris endorsed me in my race to unseat one of the most vulnerable Republicans in Congress.

It brings me great joy to get to return the favor and endorse her to be the next Vice President of the United States.

Kamala and I share a deep commitment to fighting for every American to have access to quality affordable health care.

We both lost our moms to cancer. We both saw firsthand how desperately America needs a healthcare system that isn't based on how much money you have or where you live. [**_I 'm so hopeful there are better days ahead. But the truth is that it is going to take all of us stepping up at this pivotal moment in history. So I'm asking: Can you chip in even just a couple of dollars and join us in this fight?_**](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e818/77d4c309/218f753d/26361894/2501696844/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20200819_em_fr_b2_kara_all_RS&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250") | | [**Chip in $5 now >>**](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e818/77d4c309/218f753d/26361894/2501696844/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20200819_em_fr_b2_kara_all_RS&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")

Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e818/77d4c309/218f753d/2636189c/2501696844/VEsHBA/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, [_**please click here.**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e818/77d4c309/218f753d/2636189f/2501696844/VEsHBw/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails") We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [_please click here._](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e818/77d4c309/218f753d/2636189e/2501696844/VEsHBg/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/content/unsub-footer/")

We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support!

7117 Farnam St, Ste. 2, Omaha, NE 68132
info@eastmanforcongress.com

| | Paid for by Eastman for Congress

name: Team Joe
subject: Cresco: Virtual events to help elect Joe and Kamala are happening in your community!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Join us to show your support for Joe and Kamala! |
---
Peter -- we have 75 days left and it's going to take all of us pitching in to help elect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris.

The work we put in now could mean all the difference in winning this race. Join Team Joe this weekend near Cresco to help us reach more voters.

[Peter, there's a grassroots online event with folks from your community happening soon, and we'd love to see you there. Check out the details and RSVP now: ](https://www.mobilize.us/2020victory/event/289055/?source=JB_EM_FIELD_2020.08.20_B10_weeklyorg_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FIELD_2020.08.20_B10_weeklyorg_X__F1_S1_C1__ac) | | **WHAT: **Poconos Phone Bank
**WHEN:** Saturday, August 22nd, 2020
**TIME:** 12:00 pm EDT
**WHERE:** Online!
---
| [**RSVP now >>**](https://www.mobilize.us/2020victory/event/289055/?source=JB_EM_FIELD_2020.08.20_B10_weeklyorg_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FIELD_2020.08.20_B10_weeklyorg_X__F1_S1_C1__ac)
---
When we say our grassroots movement is powered by supporters like you, we really mean it, Peter.

Thanks for being in this fight!

Team Joe
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b5ea/1cd0ac28/169ae0971/357fbb4d/4273994104/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b5ea/1cd0ac28/169ae0971/357fbb4c/4273994104/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b5ea/1cd0ac28/169ae0971/357fbb4b/4273994104/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b5ea/1cd0ac28/169ae0971/357fbb4a/4273994104/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b5ea/1cd0ac28/169ae0971/357fbb49/4273994104/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b5ea/1cd0ac28/169ae0971/357fbb48/4273994104/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b5ea/1cd0ac28/169ae0971/357fbb47/4273994104/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b5ea/1cd0ac28/169ae0971/357fbb46/4273994104/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b5ea/1cd0ac28/169ae0971/357fbb45/4273994104/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b5ea/1cd0ac28/169ae0971/357fbb44/4273994104/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b5ea/1cd0ac28/169ae0971/357fbb47/4273994104/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b5ea/1cd0ac28/169ae0971/357fbb43/4273994104/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b5ea/1cd0ac28/169ae0971/357fbb46/4273994104/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b5ea/1cd0ac28/169ae0971/357fbb42/4273994104/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

body:
Help Josh Hicks defeat Mitch’s former intern.

|

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18768945/239166959/2073148045?refcode=fl_em_fr_20200820McGrath_AM_all_xx_xx_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjI4OTljZC1mNWUyLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ec2lJIOSu7-COy1jYNiYT70Jzg3vTm1Z65ai5fRGaBE=)
| | Friends, I’ve got some incredible news about my friend Josh Hicks, who’s running to defeat Mitch McConnell’s former intern in Kentucky’s 6th District: According to recent polling, **Josh’s race has pulled to a statistical tie—and he’s leading among the folks we most need to swing this race in November.** That’s huge. Josh’s opponent, Andy Barr, has near-universal name recognition and a national Republican money machine behind him. Even up against those advantages, an underdog challenger like Josh has completely erased the polling gap. That’s a great sign just 75 days out from Election Day. **Josh can win this—and what’s more, with 19 of our must-win counties in Josh’s district, strong voter turnout for him strengthens our campaign against Mitch McConnell as well.[_If you can, will you chip in today to support Josh’s campaign and help turn out KY-06 voters?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18768946/239166960/2073148045?refcode=fl_em_fr_20200820McGrath_AM_all_xx_xx_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjI4OTljZC1mNWUyLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ec2lJIOSu7-COy1jYNiYT70Jzg3vTm1Z65ai5fRGaBE=)** We need Josh in Congress—as a fellow Marine veteran, he’s been driven his whole life by the true meaning of public service. Josh and I also share zero patience for career politicians who ignore the needs of regular folks—something coming into even sharper relief as COVID-19 continues to batter our communities. Josh knows what it’s like to struggle to put food on the table, and in this critical moment, he's going to be a voice for regular Kentuckians—not for special interests. **Draining the swamp starts with taking down Mitch McConnell and everyone he’s enabled to get ahead in Washington. We’ll be working closely with Josh’s team in November to ensure huge voter turnout across KY-06—[ _will you chip in now to help them expand their efforts and win this?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18768947/239166961/2073148045?refcode=fl_em_fr_20200820McGrath_AM_all_xx_xx_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjI4OTljZC1mNWUyLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ec2lJIOSu7-COy1jYNiYT70Jzg3vTm1Z65ai5fRGaBE=)** Thank you, Amy

clean_body: Help Josh Hicks defeat Mitch’s former intern. | = | | Friends, I’ve got some incredible news about my friend Josh Hicks, who’s running to defeat Mitch McConnell’s former intern in Kentucky’s 6th District: According to recent polling, Josh’s race has pulled to a statistical tie—and he’s leading among the folks we most need to swing this race in November. That’s huge. Josh’s opponent, Andy Barr, has near-universal name recognition and a national Republican money machine behind him. Even up against those advantages, an underdog challenger like Josh has completely erased the polling gap. That’s a great sign just 75 days out from Election Day. Josh can win this—and what’s more, with 19 of our must-win counties in Josh’s district, strong voter turnout for him strengthens our campaign against Mitch McConnell as well.= We need Josh in Congress—as a fellow Marine veteran, he’s been driven his whole life by the true meaning of public service. Josh and I also share zero patience for career politicians who ignore the needs of regular folks—something coming into even sharper relief as COVID-19 continues to batter our communities. Josh knows what it’s like to struggle to put food on the table, and in this critical moment, he's going to be a voice for regular Kentuckians—not for special interests. Draining the swamp starts with taking down Mitch McConnell and everyone he’s enabled to get ahead in Washington. We’ll be working closely with Josh’s team in November to ensure huge voter turnout across KY-06—= Thank you, Amy = | | = | | Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress Josh Hicks for Congress PO Box 1214 Lexington, KY 40588 United States Josh Hicks is a Democrat running to represent Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District. name: True the Vote
subject: NEW Podcast: Mass Mail Mayhem: 2020 Election Goes Postal
body:
| | | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=105A158A20A1091)
---
| | |
---
| | This week on Red, White & True... Mass Mail Mayhem: 2020 Election Goes Postal
---
| | A [new episode](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=105A158A20A1105) of the Red, White, and True podcast is here! This week, Catherine discusses the U.S. Postal Service, the delays and failures of a universal mail-in voting process, and why citizen engagement is critical in the upcoming election this November.
---
| | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=105A158A20A1105)
---
| | If you have encountered what you think may be election fraud, [please share your story with us](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=105A158A20A1093). The bottom line is, our election processes are vulnerable from beginning to end – and those vulnerabilities are being exploited by groups who subvert our systems to serve their purposes. The best way to protect voters’ rights is to equip citizens for service. Check out the [training resources](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=105A158A20A1104) on our website to learn more.
Click below to listen or [watch a video of the podcast](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=105A158A20A1105) on our YouTube page.

clean_body: | In 2018, progressive Democrat Mike Siegel turned Texas' 10th district from a safe GOP seat to a national battleground – and in 2020, he's going to finish the job. We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to remove yourself from our list, click . = | | Folks, we cannot make this more clear: Republican Michael McCaul has abandoned working Americans completely. In fact, it’s been a decade since he’s held a public town hall — he’s avoiding his constituents and shirking his responsibilities as a representative. But we’re positive his huge corporate PAC donors have no trouble getting him on the phone. That’s why he’s accepted thousands from the pharmaceutical industry, and in turn, voted against lowering our prescription drug costs. It’s time to remove McCaul from office and replace him with someone who will fight for us. But with Republican dark money groups placing huge ad buys to prop him up and Election Day coming up fast, we need your help to compete. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = McCaul won by the slimmest of margins in 2018, let’s make sure this is the year he loses once and for all. name: Mike Huckabee
subject: Big news
body:
Peter,
Here at My Faith Votes, we have big news to share.
Our progress in recruiting and registering Christian voters for November must be getting noticed because an extremely generous donor just offered to match every single donation for the remainder of this month -- not once, twice or three times, but 5X!
That means our typical, average donation of about $45 will now be worth $225.
So, starting this second, we aim to demonstrate the enthusiasm and commitment of this movement.
**[Can we count on your support? Remember -- if you give $35, it’s worth $175. If you give $50, it’s $250. And $100 is $500](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200820apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200820apl01nd&n=1).**
Not every organization has the track record and effectiveness to attract such a generous offer. But My Faith Votes is the real deal.
Whether it’s Lt. Col. Allen West coming on board as National Spokesperson or the success of our growing Christian college campus program, the momentum has been tremendous and from now until November, it’s game time.
Don’t get mad at the news on TV. Don’t complain to your spouse or friend that the powers that be seem to be hostile to our values.
Instead, help us recruit, organize, and make 2020 a historic year for Christian voter turnout.
**[Your support is crucial, and with this incredible 5X match, your ability to make an impact just grew exponentially. I hope you’ll step up with a donation today](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200820apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200820apl01nd&n=2).**
[](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200820apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200820apl01nd&n=3)
Thanks for your ongoing commitment.
Sincerely,
Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200820apl01nd&n=4)
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200820apl01nd&n=5).

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Can You Believe This?
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fck_hugo_minnesota_retarget&n=1)
---
Peter \-- Can you believe what Democrat legislative candidate John Thompson said on Saturday... "Don’t run now. Don’t run now racist white people. I’m here. Oh yeah, we pull up. We pulled the f– up,” [Thompson continued](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=mI7Ws0NkibYEXUVfFZeJkLfjac_hOXOCluyVZcQGd6WAol791J3J6wmamka8qNjuorzrY2D5d9qZlgT7xRUNmHpZZfpHn7AdIITMKM65vxPhhykgOg3y_TDJ0sEOzBiPfcwjxpATFOdoOL_Jd7UwzA&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fck_hugo_minnesota_retarget&n=2). “Blue lives ain’t s–, and if people here don’t support black people, f– Hugo, Minnesota.” That's the phrase uttered by the next Democrat legislator from House District 67A, John Thompson, as he and other agitators stood in front of the home of Minneapolis police union chief, Bob Kroll on Saturday. **What's happening in American political discourse right now is dangerous for the future prosperity of our country. BLM and Antifa not only are getting a pass from the mainstream media, they're being applauded by Democrats in power.** And Governor Walz is no different. Racist agitator John Thompson received Tim Walz' endorsement before last week's primary election. Now John Thompson is a lock for the November election in the heavily progressive St Paul district. You'd think Democrats across the state would rush to the microphone to condemn Thompson's behavior. But there's silence from many of them, while guys like Tim Walz are brushing this off as not a big deal. **Action 4 Liberty will make sure voters in those districts know what the Democrats stand for in this election!** Radicals like John Thompson and Ilhan Omar are becoming the face of the modern Democrat party. In places like Minneapolis and St Paul, there's very little we can do to stop these people from getting elected. It's the liberal zombie apocalypse! So instead, our strategy is to get principled, liberty fighters elected in conservative districts so we don't send weak-kneed, run-of-the-mill Republicans up to the Capitol as our last line of defense. Last week, Action 4 Liberty was able to help Rep Jeremy Munson win his Republican primary election against the establishment's hand picked challenger. Munson won in a landslide. **More importantly, we helped a real liberty champ Erik Mortensen cross the finish line in House District 55A. That seat is currently occupied by crazy liberal, Brad Tabke.** Tabke is one of the remaining Democrats in Republican districts who has not voted to remove Walz' emergency powers. He's really showing his true colors. Brad Tabke also has remained silent on condemning the behavior of his soon-to-be colleague in the House, John Thompson. The best way to drown out the voice of racist agitators like Thompson is by getting real liberty fighters elected. That's why races like Erik Mortensen's are so important! The stakes are huge these days. We need to End Walz' Emergency Powers and it seems more and more likely that the way to do it is at the ballot box. **Governor Walz is power hungry. Allowing one person to make rules that govern free people is the most un-American ideal that exists. He MUST BE STOPPED!**
## [HELP US STOP HIM](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fck_hugo_minnesota_retarget&n=3)
It's time to build a better team of legislators at the Capitol. We can drown out the voices of radicals like John Thompson by getting a team of liberty fighters like Erik Mortensen in office. _Help Action 4 Liberty take the fight to these Democrats in swing districts. They need to continue feeling the heat all the way til November._ | [](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fck_hugo_minnesota_retarget&n=4 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fck_hugo_minnesota_retarget&n=5)
---
Let's hold these Democrats accountable and **turn up the heat** on them. We MUST do everything we can to take back our state.
**[With your support. we can prevail. Please consider helping with a $25, $50, $100 or even $250 donation today.](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fck_hugo_minnesota_retarget&n=6)**
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fck_hugo_minnesota_retarget&n=7).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fck_hugo_minnesota_retarget&n=8).
Created with [NationBuilder](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fck_hugo_minnesota_retarget&n=9), software for leaders.

name: John Carney for Governor
subject: Join James Carville, President Clinton's campaign manager and political pundit in support of John Carney
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends for John Carney |
body:
Dear Friend,

Hope to see at our event Thursday evening. Your support is critical to our re-election efforts and very much appreciated.

Thursday
August 27th 6-7 p.m.
My first campaign event of the year

Thanks,
John Carney

Please join Join James Carville, President Clinton's Campaign Manager and Political Pundit in support of Governor Carney's re-election campaign for a virtual event.

Thursday, August 27, 2020
6:00 - 7:00 p.m.
Via Zoom
Login information will be sent to RSVPs week-of event

Suggested Contribution Levels: $1200 * $600 * $300

You can RSVP online by using this link: www.johncarney.org/carville or you can contact our campaign office by phone, 302-395-0707, or email, rsvp@johncarney.org.

Checks should be made payable to Friends For John Carney and mailed to:
Friends for John Carney, P.O. Box 2162, Wilmington, DE 19899

Team Carney

The Friends for John Carney Campaign may accept contributions from individuals, corporations, labor organizations, partnerships, and other entities up to $1,200 per election period. Contributions are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.

Only individuals who are American citizens or permanent resident aliens that reside in the United States may contribute. In addition, only corporations who are incorporated in the United States, who utilize U.S. proceeds for the contribution, and for which the decision to contribute was made by an American citizen or permanent resident alien may contribute.

Contributions from corporations, companies, organizations, incorporated or unincorporated associations, general or limited partnerships, or other entities that contribute must:
- Include the full names and mailing addresses of all individuals who own a legal or equitable interest of 50% or greater in that entity, or notify us that no such person exists (the entity’s contribution is allocated pro-rata to identified persons, subject to limits);
-Include a responsible party if the aggregate amount of contributions during the election period exceeds $100; and
-Include the following form: http://elections.delaware.gov/pubs/cf_corporate_contribution_notice.pdf.

---------------------------------------------
| Paid for by Friends for John Carney |
---------------------------------------------

Friends for John Carney
19 E Commons Blvd
2nd Floor
New Castle DE 19720 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please https://act.myngp.com/el/rxwpvaXMEDjXW3s5b1v69g==/Je__Fr5tGsmOXdYOJFBf9Q==.

---
| |
---
| | You're invited to join our amazing lineup of South Side leaders for a virtual event this Friday! We'll get the event kicked off at 6 pm, and you won't want to miss it.

Our chairs and hosts will discuss the importance of flipping IL-16 from **#RedtoBlue,** and help get you fired up for the last stretch of the campaign! **We are honored to have the support of these wonderful leaders and elected officials who share our values, and we want you to join them.**

[Click here to RSVP and join us on Friday night! ](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=d331a34098&e=140a9b81e7)

The race is heating up, and as we wind down the final 75-day stretch, it's more important than ever that Democrats come together and are united up and down the ticket. **This event will showcase the type of unity that is necessary for the blue wave we all want to see. **

So join us on Friday night, and unite with Democrats who are fighting for our values and working to defeat Donald Trump and his Republican friends this November.

Team Dani

name: Taylor, MJ Hegar HQ
subject: Data
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We'll let you in on some campaign secrets.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e15/7f51f7bc/433d6967/4ef7ef78/986155433/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | **ONE DAY GOAL**
**Total goal for 8/20/20: $15,000**
**Goal for Your Area: 26 People** | [DONATE NOW](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e15/7f51f7bc/433d6967/4ef7ef7e/986155433/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200820.1nd__1942__&amount=10")
---
I know we talk a lot about goals on this campaign, and here's the thing, Peter -- they're important. They help us know how much money we have to put toward voter outreach. They let us plan ahead in committing money to reach voters across Texas.

**We think it 's important to be transparent on MJ's team, which is why we share our goals with you.**

We don't just tell everyone what our goals are or how we come up with these numbers -- they're important pieces of campaign data. We know that in your area, if the 26 people we think are most likely to donate (that includes you) pitch in our average online donation of $23, we'll be well on our way to defeating Sen. Cornyn.

**[Will you be one of those 26 people to donate today?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e15/7f51f7bc/433d6967/4ef7ef7e/986155433/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200820.1nd__1942__&amount=10")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kyle=20Hupfer=2C=20Chairman=2C=20INGOP?=
subject: Tight race for the Indiana AG
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
The battle for Indiana’s Attorney General is going to be tight. Here’s why we NEED to WIN >> | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-469658?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ce9d23d683&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
id:2020-04-23-15:43:59:705t
---
| Hoosier Republican,

Everything is on the line for the 2020 elections. We’re in an intense battle to keep our Senate majority, win back the House and fire Speaker Pelosi, AND we need to elect as many conservative attorneys general as possible.

**The AG race in Indiana is heating up, and we need all Hoosiers to step up to the plate to elect Todd Rokita.**

The coastal elites are trying to prop up an ally who will relentlessly go after President Trump and VP Pence. They’re already doing it in liberal states like New York, and we can’t let it happen here in the heartland!

Todd Rokita is proven public servant who has already represented Hoosiers as our Secretary of State and Member of Congress. He’s a constitutional conservative who will protect us from crime, uphold the rule of law, fight lawlessness in our streets, and defend — not de-fund — our men and women in blue.

[**_Will you chip in $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, or what you can to win this race for the GOP?_**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c2c79de132&e=1acd9bb3d6)

We can’t let the Democrats win this one. They will never stop their baseless, targeted attacks against the president. Our only hope is to elect principled leaders like Todd Rokita who will have President Trump's back.

---
| [DONATE NOW >>](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=076b1f3143&e=1acd9bb3d6 "DONATE NOW >>")
---
| I know that we can show up strong in this battleground race and send a message that the Dems can’t buy Indiana.

Thank you for your support,
Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana Republican Party

---
|
---
---
---

---

name: Kyle Hupfer
subject: re: the best in the country

body:
Did you see the Lieutenant Governor debate? There’s no question about it, Hoosiers are lucky we have the best Lieutenant Governor in the country. | |

Friend,

Did you see yesterday's Lieutenant Governor debate?

_There’s no question about it, Hoosiers are lucky to have the best Lieutenant Governor in the country — Suzanne Crouch. _

Her knowledge, poise, and dedication to Indiana were on full display yesterday during the debate and I couldn’t be prouder to call her my Lieutenant Governor.

**But don’t take my word for it.**

Take Team Holcomb’s! Governor Holcomb has worked closely with her over the last four years to build One Indiana for All and he knows Lt. Governor Crouch better than anyone. Take a look at some of the tweets the team sent yesterday:

name: Pete Buttigieg
subject: Peter, reaching out before our convention ends tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
This is going to be a tough battle, but it's one we can win if we all stand together. |
---
| [](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B1_PeteConv_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B1_PeteConv_X__F1_S1_C1__full")
---
Good morning, Peter,

Today is the final day of our convention, and I'm reaching out directly before my speech tonight to ask if you'll be one of the first-time donors in Pennsylvania we need to help raise this last $225,000 before the closing gavel tonight.

[Joe and Kamala can't beat Trump alone, Peter, it's going to take all of us. If you're in a position where you can chip in $25 today to fuel this fight, will you contribute?](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B1_PeteConv_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B1_PeteConv_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

We've been waiting since November 9, 2016, for the opportunity to show the world that Donald Trump does not represent the America we believe in, and that opportunity is going to be here before we know it.

We have exactly one shot at defeating Donald Trump -- that's it -- one shot at bringing this country together and galvanizing an American majority to deliver a better future for us all.

That makes our choice real simple this year, Peter: [We can either do everything in our power to elect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, or we can sit back and give Trump four more years to dissolve our democracy.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B1_PeteConv_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B1_PeteConv_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

I'm going to do everything in my power to make every one of the next 75 days count, Peter, by showing up every single day and doing my part to help defeat Trump, and I'm asking you to do the same.

[This is going to be a tough battle, but it's one we can win if we all stand together.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B1_PeteConv_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B1_PeteConv_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

[So, Peter, if you can pitch in a few bucks to own a piece of this fight today, will you join your neighbors in pitching in to hit our Pennsylvania fundraising goal? We have $225,000 left to go, and only a few hours to make it happen.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B1_PeteConv_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B1_PeteConv_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

Before I go, Peter, I want to thank you for everything you're doing for this team. It means so much to stand with you at this moment and know that we're standing for a brighter future together.

I'll see you tonight when I take the virtual stage for the final night of the convention.

Let's do this,

Pete Buttigieg
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b633/1cd0ac28/169d8b6f5/357fc64a/38991938/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b633/1cd0ac28/169d8b6f5/357fc649/38991938/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b633/1cd0ac28/169d8b6f5/357fc648/38991938/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b633/1cd0ac28/169d8b6f5/357fc647/38991938/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and Kamala Harris's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b633/1cd0ac28/169d8b6f5/357fc642/38991938/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE AND KAMALA »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b633/1cd0ac28/169d8b6f5/357fc641/38991938/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Please read (the Democratic Convention, Kamala Harris, and Joe Biden)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
I've been watching the Democratic convention from my living room this week and I have to tell you, everyone, I'm inspired. Last night, **Kamala Harris became the first woman of color to accept the nomination for Vice President of the United States.**
But with the President focused on undoing everything from access to affordable health care to a functioning Postal Service, Joe Biden is right: **We 're in a battle for the soul of our nation, and we have work to do.**
[**That 's why I have to ask: Please give $3 or as much as you can to help elect Joe and Kamala to the White House this November.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc5c3/2a380d31/233403f1/f0a569/1092727726/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0YmlkZW5oYXJyaXMiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMDgyMF9NV0g0QmlkZW5IYXJyaXMtY29udl9uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4bidenharris?refcode=e20200820_MWH4BidenHarris-conv_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Kamala Harris & Joe Biden, and Maggie Hassan._
**[Click to donate $3.](https://act.maggiehassan.%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4bidenharris?refcode=e20200820_MWH4BidenHarris-conv_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=3")**
**[Click to donate $25.](https://act.maggiehassan.?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4bidenharris?refcode=e20200820_MWH4BidenHarris-conv_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](https://act.maggiehassan.?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4bidenharris?refcode=e20200820_MWH4BidenHarris-conv_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc5c3/2a380d31/233403f1/f0a569/1092727726/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0YmlkZW5oYXJyaXMiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMDgyMF9NV0g0QmlkZW5IYXJyaXMtY29udl9uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4bidenharris?refcode=e20200820_MWH4BidenHarris-conv_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
Donald Trump and Mike Pence have shown that they'll do whatever they think they can get away with to skew this election in their favor. Right now, we're seeing them shutter and remove mailboxes, and the President has even suggested the election could be delayed.
The energy in our party is palpable but in this tumultuous environment, we've got to do more than just motivate Democrats to vote. We also have to raise enough money to educate voters about the safest and most secure ways to cast their ballots.
Democrats can do this -- but only if this grassroots community steps up. [**Can I count on you to give $3 or more right now to make Donald Trump a one term President?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc5c3/2a380d31/233403f1/f0a569/1092727726/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0YmlkZW5oYXJyaXMiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMDgyMF9NV0g0QmlkZW5IYXJyaXMtY29udl9uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4bidenharris?refcode=e20200820_MWH4BidenHarris-conv_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Thank you for getting involved at this critical moment.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
> [Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc5c3/2a380d31/233403f1/f0a569/1092727726/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0YmlkZW5oYXJyaXMiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMDgyMF9NV0g0QmlkZW5IYXJyaXMtY29udl9uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4bidenharris?refcode=e20200820_MWH4BidenHarris-conv_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

subject: The Israel-UAE Deal Proves That President Trump's Foreign Policy is Working
body:
President Trump has so far been a remarkably successful foreign-policy president. His success lies in his ability to identify America’s national... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=21f1e0a988&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **The Israel-UAE Deal Proves That President Trump's Foreign Policy is Working**

“President Trump has so far been a remarkably successful foreign-policy president. His success lies in his ability to identify America’s national interest clearly and pursue it without regard to outdated ideological investments,” Daniel McCarthy writes in _The American Conservative_.

>From China to Iran to the new Middle East deal between Israel and the United Arab Emirates, “Donald Trump can succeed where the others fail because he is transactional, not ideological, and he looks out for the American interest—which is peace through stability—rather than trying to bring about peace through perfection.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=74877e32c7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “More than 1,000 arrests have been made in major metropolitan cities since the Department of Justice launched Operation Legend in July,” Danielle Wallace reports. “Operation Legend is the heart of the federal government’s response to this upturn in violent crime,” Attorney General William Barr said. Read more in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3c7cefe369&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Catholic churches across the country have been open for up to four months since shelter-in-place orders were lifted . . . The Good News: for Catholic churches following [CDC] guidelines, no outbreaks of COVID-19 have been linked to church attendance,” doctors Paul Cieslak, Timothy Flanigan, and Thomas McGovern write in [_RealClearScience_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e4d49f4855&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Millions of Californians have lost power in recent days amid a brutal heat wave, and state regulators warn of more outages in the days and perhaps years to come. Welcome to California’s green new normal . . . California’s Independent System Operator (Caiso) has been warning for years that the state’s increasing dependence on intermittent renewables, especially solar, is making it harder to ensure reliable power,” [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=73b25d517f&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|

name: Barack Obama
subject: Let me be clear, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
If you're serious about our democracy, then you can't afford to stay on the sidelines in this election. |
---
| [](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B2_bho2_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B2_bho2_X__F1_S1_C1__full")
---
Peter,

Last night, I told you in my speech to the Democratic Convention that we _all_ need to do more to help elect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris as the next President and Vice President of the United States.

I hope that you heard me loud and clear, and that you're ready to [chip in $25 or whatever you can afford right now to help keep Joe and Kamala's campaign running strong.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B2_bho2_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B2_bho2_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

Here's why this matters so much, Peter: Our country's future hangs on this election, and **I can tell you from experience that the final months of the campaign won 't be easy.**

But if you believe in an America where everybody has a fair shot at opportunity; where facts and science matter; where we guarantee that every single American citizen has equal representation in our government; and where our government actually works for the people it's supposed to represent -- then I'm asking you to join me in making sure that Joe Biden and Kamala Harris win in November.

**Let me be clear, Peter: if you 're serious about our democracy, then you can't afford to stay on the sidelines in this election.** You've got to get into this fight for the soul of America alongside Joe Biden and Kamala Harris -- because democracy isn't a spectator sport, and they need all of our help right now.

[That's why I'm asking you to get involved right now, by chipping in $25 or whatever you can spare to help Joe and Kamala win this election:](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B2_bho2_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B2_bho2_X__F1_S1_C1__full")
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Barack Obama

---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b654/1cd0ac28/1690454d0/357fc073/2909229323/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b654/1cd0ac28/1690454d0/357fc072/2909229323/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b654/1cd0ac28/1690454d0/357fc071/2909229323/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b654/1cd0ac28/1690454d0/357fc070/2909229323/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b654/1cd0ac28/1690454d0/357fc06f/2909229323/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b654/1cd0ac28/1690454d0/357fc06e/2909229323/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b654/1cd0ac28/1690454d0/357fc071/2909229323/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b654/1cd0ac28/1690454d0/357fc06d/2909229323/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b654/1cd0ac28/1690454d0/357fc070/2909229323/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b654/1cd0ac28/1690454d0/357fc06c/2909229323/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: J.D. Scholten
subject: STATS: 6' 6", 225 lbs, Right-handed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter,

As a kid, I loved baseball cards. I collected them and played with them for hours.

**[Today, I’m excited to share my first official campaign baseball card with you. If you want to get your hands on one, chip in $5 or more by midnight tonight -- and I’ll even autograph it (stale gum is not included)!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18777404/239316822/-502054532?refcode=em20_200820_baseballcardcontest_inact&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjM5MzQwYy0yOWUzLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VLuFnisSF7-G-stjX6RkWAVicGwWXoM97XASJiCk1KU=)**

I’m running our people-powered campaign just like my baseball days. We’re bringing people together from all backgrounds: white, Black or brown, Democrat, Republican, Independent, or never voted before -- everyone is welcome on our team.

We’re working together toward a common purpose to ensure that the better days are ahead, not behind, Iowa’s 4th district. We’re building this district into the epicenter for 21st-century resilient agriculture and revitalized rural communities, where everyone has a fair shot to make a decent living and provide for their family.

Our campaign is all about you, _not me_. It’s a promise (actually 5!) that I’m fighting for you, that I’ll always show up and listen, and even when we disagree, we’ll have mutual respect for one another because we’re all working for Iowa, and that I’ll keep fighting for issues that matter to all Iowans.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18777405/239316823/-502054532?refcode=em20_200820_baseballcardcontest_inact&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjM5MzQwYy0yOWUzLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VLuFnisSF7-G-stjX6RkWAVicGwWXoM97XASJiCk1KU=)
---

It’s not my rookie card, but here are those 5 campaign promises:
1. Iowans over political party
2. I will always show up
3. Fix health care
4. Fight for an economy that works for everyone
5. Secure our democracy from special interests

It’s not every promise I’m making to you and your family but they’re some of the big ones.

We’re officially 75 days away from November 3rd, and I know that each day things are going to feel a little tougher than the last. But as long as I’ve got you on this team, Peter -- I know that we can win.

clean_body: Peter, As a kid, I loved baseball cards. I collected them and played with them for hours. = I’m running our people-powered campaign just like my baseball days. We’re bringing people together from all backgrounds: white, Black or brown, Democrat, Republican, Independent, or never voted before -- everyone is welcome on our team. We’re working together toward a common purpose to ensure that the better days are ahead, not behind, Iowa’s 4th district. We’re building this district into the epicenter for 21st-century resilient agriculture and revitalized rural communities, where everyone has a fair shot to make a decent living and provide for their family. Our campaign is all about you, not me. It’s a promise (actually 5!) that I’m fighting for you, that I’ll always show up and listen, and even when we disagree, we’ll have mutual respect for one another because we’re all working for Iowa, and that I’ll keep fighting for issues that matter to all Iowans. | = It’s not my rookie card, but here are those 5 campaign promises: 1. Iowans over political party 2. I will always show up 3. Fix health care 4. Fight for an economy that works for everyone 5. Secure our democracy from special interests It’s not every promise I’m making to you and your family but they’re some of the big ones. We’re officially 75 days away from November 3rd, and I know that each day things are going to feel a little tougher than the last. But as long as I’ve got you on this team, Peter -- I know that we can win. = = Standing Tall For All, J.D. Scholten =

Friend —

We did it! Not only am I now the official Democratic nominee for Florida’s 16th Congressional District, we exceeded our ambitious $25,000 fundraising goal before the FEC Primary Election deadline! It’s all thanks to our most trusted supporters who donated what they could and are taking an active role in this campaign. Thank you.

Vern Buchanan and the special interests backing him are afraid, and they should be — our campaign is powered by thousands of grassroots supporters (you included!) who want to bring accountability to Washington and want a representative who will work tirelessly to put the interests of the people first. Thousands of actual people who care about our state, our country, and our democracy are working together to make this happen.

It’s clear that the momentum is on our side. We are showing everyone that, together, we will win this district and bring real, positive change to Florida and our nation.

Thank you for being part of this work.

Margaret

name: Cory Booker
subject: One way to give our kids better health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

I'm writing to you today to let you know about a bill that I'm working on with my friend Mark Warner.

Health care -- including access to affordable prescription drugs -- is a fundamental right. Mark and I are on the same page about that. Unfortunately, children from low-income families who are participating in the Children's Health Insurance Program (CHIP) aren't getting the lowest possible prices for medicines they depend on. **That 's just plain wrong.**

So Mark and I introduced the _Fair Drug Prices for Kids Act_ , which would bring those prices down. There's no reason that we should pay more for the medicines our kids depend on, and this bill fixes that while improving care for the more than four million children nationally enrolled in a standalone CHIP program.

I might have given Mark a hard time about his terrible cooking skills, but I'd never give him a hard time about his dedication to the people of Virginia. Mark cares about making things better for every Virginian, from lowering the price of prescription drugs to making sure the economy works for everyone.

Mark knows that no matter how long you've held your seat, you have to hold yourself accountable to your constituents and constantly prove yourself worthy of people's support. That's why he's campaigning his heart out, even in these unprecedented times. We're both on the ballot this November, and both of our campaigns are scaling up to make sure that we reach every possible voter.

**If you 're in a position to do so, please consider making a donation to support Mark's and my re-election campaigns.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically processed and split between Mark Warner and Cory Booker:_

clean_body: | | | Folks, Tonight we will watch Joe Biden accept the nomination for President at the Democratic Convention and I am becoming more energized than ever, but we’re facing a budget deficit in our Voter Outreach program that we MUST close before Friday at midnight to stay on top of our goals. \--- Begin Forwarded Message --- | “We have got to grab our comfortable shoes, put on our masks, pack a brown bag dinner and maybe breakfast too, because we’ve got to be willing to stand in line all night if we have to.” \- Michelle Obama on the importance of voting, Day 1, 2020 Democratic Convention | | Michelle is right. Voting in November has NEVER been more critical. And here at Driskell HQ, we are committed to getting out the vote in every corner of this district. But we can’t do it without you. The Democratic Convention has folks fired up and ready to go, but we can’t take our foot of the gas for a second! It’s critical for our Voter Outreach effort that we get at least 300 more donors by Friday at midnight. | We know, with your help, we can send a blue wave across America on November 3rd. It is time for us to stand up, unite and repair the divide. For too long establishment Republicans like Tim Walberg have put politics and party over the needs of Michiganders – and enough is enough. We need strong leaders like Gretchen now more than ever – but we can’t do it alone. If you’ve stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | | Thank you for your continued support! Team Driskell Paid for by Gretchen Driskell for Congress Gretchen Driskell is running for Congress in Michigan's 7th district against incumbent Tim Walberg. As a nonpartisan mayor, Gretchen had to balance the budget, make tough decisions, and deliver results for people in our community. name: Team Ossoff
subject: Before Joe Biden accepts the nomination
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
We need new leadership in Washington. |
---
Friend,

After Joe Biden formally accepts the Democratic nomination for President tonight, the race to Election Day is on.

**And Jon Ossoff's race here in Georgia will be getting a lot more attention,_because Joe Biden will NEED a Democratic Senate to get us out of this public health and economic disaster._**

**Experts are saying that if we win in Georgia, we will retake the Senate.**

Jon Ossoff has all the grassroots momentum right now. His race with David Perdue is deadlocked in the polls!

But Perdue has corporate PACs and the GOP's dark money network on his side.

_Jon has the people -- and right now, we need to show everyone the strength of his people-powered grassroots movement!_

**[Friend, can you chip in $10 before Joe Biden speaks tonight to show our momentum and help elect Jon?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e251a/5b2c1286/3f411612/25f042fc/2129188636/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_20_fr_15_before_biden?refcode=em_2020_08_20_fr_15_before_biden&amount=10")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| | [Express Donate: $10](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e251a/5b2c1286/3f411612/25f042ff/2129188636/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_20_fr_15_before_biden?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_2020_08_20_fr_15_before_biden_ex_10")

---
| [Express Donate: $100](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e251a/5b2c1286/3f411612/25f04200/2129188636/VEsD/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_20_fr_15_before_biden?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_2020_08_20_fr_15_before_biden_ex_100")

| [Or donate another amount](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e251a/5b2c1286/3f411612/25f04203/2129188636/VEsA/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_20_fr_15_before_biden?express_lane_other=true&refcode=em_2020_08_20_fr_15_before_biden_ex_other")
---

Friend, Biden is going to need reformers like Jon in the Senate to help him restore the soul of our nation and create the change that millions of Americans are yearning for.

We need strong, moral, and compassionate leadership to lead us out of this crisis. We need leaders who are ready to root out corruption, address these problems head on, and fight for the people.

**Jon will provide that principled leadership and actually serve the people of Georgia -- unlike Perdue, who puts the interests of his rich corporate donors first.**

We can't continue with the failed leadership of Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and David Perdue. Friend, we must elect Jon to the U.S. Senate.

**[Can you donate today before Joe Biden speaks to ensure he has a Democratic Senate ready to lead us out of this crisis?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e251a/5b2c1286/3f411612/25f04202/2129188636/VEsB/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_20_fr_15_before_biden?refcode=em_2020_08_20_fr_15_before_biden")**

Thanks for all you do,

Team Ossoff

Hi Peter, Join Team Finello for our first ever Weekend of Action this weekend on Saturday 8/22 & Sunday 8/23! [http://www.mobilize.us/finelloforcongress] There are only 75 days left until the Election, less than three months! There is no time left to wait to get invovled, we need to take action now to flip PA-01 Blue! Take it from President Barack Obama, who recently endorsed Christina:[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/76523/images/i%20will%20vote.jpeg] Join Christina and Team Finello, Get Involved, And Speak To Community Members About Why We Need To Flip PA-01 Blue! [http://www.mobilize.us/finelloforcongress] There are multiple shift times over the entire weekend, so there is a time that works with everybody's schedule. Team Finello will provide comprehensive trainings before each of the shifts to ensure that everybody who joins us is comfortable, excited, and more than ready to speak with community members in PA-01. There are multiple ways to get involved during the Weekend of Action, so pick what works for your schedule! name: Troy Nehls
subject: Outstanding patriots supporting my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nehls for Congress
body:
Tap or click to read more >>>
Friend, Do you know what former U.S. Navy SEAL and Congressman Dan Crenshaw and former U.S. Navy SEAL Rob O’Neill, the man who fired the shots that killed Bin Laden, have in common? They are both outstanding American patriots, and have both officially ENDORSED my campaign to represent Texas’ 22nd District in Congress! I am grateful for their strong support, as I run to bring a commonsense approach and decades of proven service to Washington. That’s what it’s all about, Friend. Putting you, your loved ones, and our communities first. As a US Army Major (Ret.) and a 28-year law enforcement officer, I’ve spent my entire adult life serving our country, keeping the peace on our streets, and enforcing the law. **Serving as your next Congressman is another way I can do my part to build a secure and prosperous American future and defend life and liberty, for our children, grandchildren, and generations to come!** [Rush Your Contribution. Click or Tap Here!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/1ab8a0c987aed36c/11fba369b9d01838c3d6b838967d376c/35193) Will you join these great Americans in standing with my campaign? [**Tap or click to make a $5, $10, $25, or $50 special contribution**.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/1ab8a0c987aed36c/1e3f015bff18b831c3d6b838967d376c/35193) Thank you for ALL your support in this fight, Friend. It means the world to me.

Together, I know we can stand our ground and prevail here in the 22nd... no matter how much my opponent’s big money DC supporters spend trying to buy our seat! -Troy [Stand with Sheriff Nehls - Contribute Now!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/1ab8a0c987aed36c/414179e78a33bc1ec3d6b838967d376c/35193) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/1ab8a0c987aed36c/9a4cae8efb3b9042c3d6b838967d376c/35193) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/1ab8a0c987aed36c/c35a34268b5c9b93c3d6b838967d376c/35193)

subject: It's on us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We've got less than three months left to win, Peter.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e17/7f51f7bc/433061a2/4ef7d018/1580890029/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter,

I'm reaching out personally because my Texas finance director tells me we're still a bit behind on donations from your community. It's incredibly important to me that we get on track to meet our goal for the day. 26 donations should be an attainable number for your area, and I wanted to make sure you knew that **[I am counting on you to help us get there.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e17/7f51f7bc/433061a2/4ef7d01f/1580890029/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NDQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200820.2nd__1944__&amount=10")**

We can beat Sen. Cornyn this November -- less than three months from now -- but it's going to take a lot of work to overcome all of his special interest and corporate PAC money. People are rushing to help Mitch McConnell's right hand man, and that's why your donation today means so much to me. **[Do you have my back?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e17/7f51f7bc/433061a2/4ef7d01f/1580890029/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NDQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200820.2nd__1944__&amount=10")** \-- MJ

| [DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e17/7f51f7bc/433061a2/4ef7d01f/1580890029/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NDQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200820.2nd__1944__&amount=10")
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e17/7f51f7bc/433061a2/4ef7d01e/1580890029/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NDQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1944&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e17/7f51f7bc/433061a2/4ef7d01d/1580890029/VEsA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

name: Team Gaetz
subject: Should Biden debate President Trump?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GYxjAAZUS7edjmvKasMIrtMktPzbsxM5W24_kMDYt_7SWt7uPPBQP_24anTL4j36RiGC2lUVAI5jTt1cFHyasg2Xaiotp6OSqNXXrPbtxbnKjGur0punkapfVLUJX16C0VXPNyrAKvhG0et9juqSdjziYuh06J_WoseSovUxwp45GswLyVoKv_g-Pq2WJxw_&c=qRbcUmMzP1CSNl4q0e8-kMNFAarjlnoFioVDxY7-ABIImDLxLOeZZw==&ch=sVK8LC3zxFdXf-u08qyerlTEamqUSuv436tdYAqVFZ_pdUJs4MDB8w==)
---
| Peter,
As we get closer and closer to the general election, many of us are looking forward to the Presidential debates. Anyone who has been paying attention to Joe Biden's mental decline knows that President Trump will likely leave the Biden campaign crying "Uncle!"
Now, the media is beginning to downplay the importance of the debates, even suggesting that they aren't important to the electoral process. They are laying early cover in case Joe Biden decides not to get on stage with President Trump.
We want to hear from you: Should Joe Biden have to debate President Trump? It takes just one minute to let us know.
---

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Peter, As we get closer and closer to the general election, many of us are looking forward to the Presidential debates. Anyone who has been paying attention to Joe Biden's mental decline knows that President Trump will likely leave the Biden campaign crying "Uncle!" Now, the media is beginning to downplay the importance of the debates, even suggesting that they aren't important to the electoral process. They are laying early cover in case Joe Biden decides not to get on stage with President Trump. We want to hear from you: Should Joe Biden have to debate President Trump? It takes just one minute to let us know. | | | == | | | == | == | Joe Biden doesn't stand a chance in a debate with the President, but the liberal media will give him a free pass if he decides not to. They will do whatever it takes to get Biden elected, but we want to ensure this election is fair.
