name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: My speech from last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
I was honored to address the Democratic National Convention last night from the Early Childhood Education Center in Springfield, Massachusetts. In case you didn't get a chance to watch it, here's a li | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525042/45c30650/1c27da9b0/66e83f48/2040488387/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
I was honored to address the Democratic National Convention last night from the Early Childhood Education Center in Springfield, Massachusetts.

**[In case you didn't get a chance to watch it, here's a link to the video, and you can scroll down to read the full text.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525042/45c30650/1c27da9b0/66e83f4b/2040488387/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWF1ZzIwZnItZG5jYyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1VMTBGX0VHUl9TQ0hfRV8yMDIwMDgyMF9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-aug20fr-dncc?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU10F_EGR_SCH_E_20200820_V1S1_P&noskip=true")**

You know, I never thought I'd run for office -- not in a zillion years. And I never thought I'd speak at a big political convention.

But I realized that it was a way to keep up the fight for a country that works for everyone, not just the rich and powerful. And that fight has never been more critical.

We must do everything we can to elect Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Democrats across the country this November. And I'm honored to be in this fight by your side.

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

\--

Tonight we've heard from the people who make America work, people who put their lives on the line to keep our country going, and since COVID-19 hit, they've taken one gut punch after another.

And what has the COVID fallout done to our babies? I'm here at the Early Childhood Education Center in Springfield, Massachusetts, which has been closed for months. Childcare was already hard to find before the pandemic. And now, parents are stuck -- no idea when schools can safely reopen and even fewer childcare options.

The devastation is enormous. And the way I see it: big problems demand big solutions.

I love a good plan, and Joe Biden has some really good plans -- plans to bring back union jobs in manufacturing and create new union jobs in clean energy. Plans to increase Social Security benefits, cancel billions in student loan debt, and make our bankruptcy laws work for families instead of the creditors who cheat them.

These plans reflect a central truth: our economic system has been rigged to give bailouts to billionaires and kick dirt in the face of everyone else. But we can build a thriving economy by investing in families and fixing what's broken. Joe's plan to "build back better" includes making the wealthy pay their fair share, holding corporations accountable, repairing racial inequities, and fighting corruption in Washington.

Let me tell you about one of Joe's plans that's especially close to my heart: childcare.

As a little girl growing up in Oklahoma, what I wanted most in the world was to be a teacher.

I loved teaching. When I had babies and was juggling my first big teaching job down in Texas, it was hard. But I could do hard. The thing that almost sank me? Childcare.

One night my Aunt Bee called to check in. I thought I was fine, but then I just broke down and started to cry. I had tried holding it all together, but without reliable childcare, working was nearly impossible. And when I told Aunt Bee I was going to quit my job, I thought my heart would break.

Then she said the words that changed my life: "I can't get there tomorrow, but I'll come on Thursday." She arrived with seven suitcases and a Pekingese named Buddy and stayed for 16 years. I get to be here tonight because of my Aunt Bee.

I learned a fundamental truth: nobody makes it on their own.

And yet, two generations of working parents later, if you have a baby and don't have an Aunt Bee, you're on your own.

And here's why that's wrong: We build infrastructure like roads, bridges and communications systems so that people can work.

That infrastructure helps us all because it keeps our economy going. It's time to recognize that childcare is part of the basic infrastructure of this nation -- it's infrastructure for families.

Joe and Kamala will make high-quality child care affordable for every family, make preschool universal, and raise the wages for every child care worker.

That's just one plan, but it gives you an idea of how we get this country working for everyone.

Donald Trump's ignorance and incompetence have always been a danger to our country. COVID-19 was Trump's biggest test. He failed miserably. Today, America has the most COVID deaths in the world and an economic collapse -- and both crises are falling hardest on Black and Brown families.

Millions out of work. Millions more trapped in cycles of poverty. Millions on the brink of losing their homes. Millions of restaurants and stores hanging by a thread.

This crisis is bad -- and didn't have to be this way. This crisis is on Donald Trump and the Republicans who enable him. On November 3, we hold them all accountable.

So, whether you're planning to vote wearing a mask or vote by mail, please, take out your phone right now and text VOTE to 30330.

We all need to be in the fight to get Joe and Kamala elected. And after November, we all need to stay in the fight to get big things done.

We stay in this fight so that when our children and our grandchildren ask what we did during this dark chapter in our nation's history, we will be able to look them squarely in the eye and say: we organized, we persisted, and we changed America.

| **Elizabeth needs your help to elect Democrats up and down the ballot this year.**If a donation makes sense, chip in $2 or whatever you can right now and let's make big, structural change a reality.**

| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525042/45c30650/1c27da9b0/66e83f4a/2040488387/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWF1ZzIwZnItZG5jYyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1VMTBGX0VHUl9TQ0hfRV8yMDIwMDgyMF9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-aug20fr-dncc?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU10F_EGR_SCH_E_20200820_V1S1_P")
---

In case you didn't get a chance to watch it, here's a li | | | "" I was honored to address the Democratic National Convention last night from the Early Childhood Education Center in Springfield, Massachusetts. "" You know, I never thought I'd run for office -- not in a zillion years. And I never thought I'd speak at a big political convention. But I realized that it was a way to keep up the fight for a country that works for everyone, not just the rich and powerful. And that fight has never been more critical. We must do everything we can to elect Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Democrats across the country this November. And I'm honored to be in this fight by your side. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth \-- Tonight we've heard from the people who make America work, people who put their lives on the line to keep our country going, and since COVID-19 hit, they've taken one gut punch after another. And what has the COVID fallout done to our babies? I'm here at the Early Childhood Education Center in Springfield, Massachusetts, which has been closed for months. Childcare was already hard to find before the pandemic. And now, parents are stuck -- no idea when schools can safely reopen and even fewer childcare options. The devastation is enormous. And the way I see it: big problems demand big solutions. I love a good plan, and Joe Biden has some really good plans -- plans to bring back union jobs in manufacturing and create new union jobs in clean energy. Plans to increase Social Security benefits, cancel billions in student loan debt, and make our bankruptcy laws work for families instead of the creditors who cheat them. These plans reflect a central truth: our economic system has been rigged to give bailouts to billionaires and kick dirt in the face of everyone else. But we can build a thriving economy by investing in families and fixing what's broken. Joe's plan to "build back better" includes making the wealthy pay their fair share, holding corporations accountable, repairing racial inequities, and fighting corruption in Washington. Let me tell you about one of Joe's plans that's especially close to my heart: childcare. As a little girl growing up in Oklahoma, what I wanted most in the world was to be a teacher. I loved teaching. When I had babies and was juggling my first big teaching job down in Texas, it was hard. But I could do hard. The thing that almost sank me? Childcare. One night my Aunt Bee called to check in. I thought I was fine, but then I just broke down and started to cry. I had tried holding it all together, but without reliable childcare, working was nearly impossible. And when I told Aunt Bee I was going to quit my job, I thought my heart would break. Then she said the words that changed my life: "I can't get there tomorrow, but I'll come on Thursday." She arrived with seven suitcases and a Pekingese named Buddy and stayed for 16 years. I get to be here tonight because of my Aunt Bee. I learned a fundamental truth: nobody makes it on their own. And yet, two generations of working parents later, if you have a baby and don't have an Aunt Bee, you're on your own. And here's why that's wrong: We build infrastructure like roads, bridges and communications systems so that people can work. That infrastructure helps us all because it keeps our economy going. It's time to recognize that childcare is part of the basic infrastructure of this nation -- it's infrastructure for families. Joe and Kamala will make high-quality child care affordable for every family, make preschool universal, and raise the wages for every child care worker. That's just one plan, but it gives you an idea of how we get this country working for everyone. Donald Trump's ignorance and incompetence have always been a danger to our country. COVID-19 was Trump's biggest test. He failed miserably. Today, America has the most COVID deaths in the world and an economic collapse -- and both crises are falling hardest on Black and Brown families. Millions out of work. Millions more trapped in cycles of poverty. Millions on the brink of losing their homes. Millions of restaurants and stores hanging by a thread. This crisis is bad -- and didn't have to be this way. This crisis is on Donald Trump and the Republicans who enable him. On November 3, we hold them all accountable. So, whether you're planning to vote wearing a mask or vote by mail, please, take out your phone right now and text VOTE to 30330. We all need to be in the fight to get Joe and Kamala elected. And after November, we all need to stay in the fight to get big things done. We stay in this fight so that when our children and our grandchildren ask what we did during this dark chapter in our nation's history, we will be able to look them squarely in the eye and say: we organized, we persisted, and we changed America. | Elizabeth needs your help to elect Democrats up and down the ballot this year.If a donation makes sense, chip in $2 or whatever you can right now and let's make big, structural change a reality. | "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content (C) 2020 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, Nancy Pelosi, and the rest of the radical Left are all teaming up to take over America in just a matter of weeks, and they’re going to get their way if conservatives don’t step up to do something about it.

_**Our 2nd Amendment won’t be safe under their watch.**_

_**A full economic recovery won’t be possible under their failed leadership.**_

_**Our police – and the communities they serve – will suffer under their agenda.**_

This is the most critical election of our lifetimes, and it’s on people like us to decide how it’s going to turn out.

**Darin is pushing harder than ever right now to fire Nancy Pelosi and flip the House back into the hands of the American people this November, and with time running out he needs your support in this fight.**

The voters of the 7th District deserve as many opportunities as possible to hear substantive debates from the candidates before making their decisions, and that is why Nick specifically asked for three of those debates to be on the specific issues of health care, the economy, and criminal justice/public safety. name: URGENT - via Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: 🚨 Georgia is a COVID red zone 🚨
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
The government's response has been catastrophic. |
---
Friend,

Georgia has the HIGHEST RATE of new COVID-19 cases _in the entire country_.

**The state is in the _red zone for severity_.**

Friend, the emergence of a deadly virus is no politician's fault.

**But responsibility for our government's undeniably catastrophic response rests 100% with President Trump and the spineless politicians who serve him, like Sen. David Perdue and Gov. Brian Kemp.**

Jon Ossoff's opponent, Perdue, thought the coronavirus would be no big deal. He was saying the risk to public health was "low" just a few months ago. He didn't push Gov. Kemp to issue a statewide mask mandate here in Georgia.

**And Perdue and Mitch McConnell think now is a good time to take a summer vacation.**

**[Friend, if you are as disgusted by the incompetence of the federal response as us, chip in $25 to help Jon Ossoff defeat David Perdue and send responsible leaders to Washington.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e251c/5b2c1286/3f45244d/25f0414a/502795320/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_20_ga_covd?refcode=em_2020_08_20_ga_covd&amount=25")**

name: Joseph R. Biden Jr.
subject: politely asking you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I am deeply humbled that you have entrusted me with the responsibility to defeat Donald Trump. |
---
Peter --

Tonight, I will formally accept the nomination to be your Democratic candidate for President of the United States.

I am deeply humbled that you have entrusted me with the responsibility to defeat Donald Trump. This election could not be more important, and it is not lost on me that we are in a position to win because of the patriotism and generosity of committed Americans like you, Peter.

As you know, there was a moment this year when the press and the pundits counted our campaign out of this race. But like my father taught me when I was a boy, when life knocks you down, you get up. You keep going, and you keep the faith.

Peter, look where we are now because we kept the faith. Look how far we've come. We're still standing -- and we're getting stronger every day. **Thanks to folks like you, in just 75 days, I believe we are going to defeat Donald Trump and win the battle for the soul of the nation. It's a tremendous opportunity, but it's also one we can't afford to miss.**

[This is a critical moment that we must capitalize on, so before I address the nation tonight, I'm politely asking you to make your first $25 donation to help us reach our $25 million fundraising goal for convention week:](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B3_JRB-preconv_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B3_JRB-preconv_X__F1_S1_C1__full") | ******Biden for President Supporter Record for [Peter Willis](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B3_JRB-preconv_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.20_B3_JRB-preconv_X__F1_S1_C1__full")******

I look forward to addressing you all tonight, and when I'm speaking, I hope you know that I'll be thinking about each and every one of you who made this moment possible.

Let's win this thing, Peter. The fate of our nation is in our hands.

Joseph R. Biden Jr.

**P.S.** Twelve years ago, I formally accepted another nomination, to be Vice President to President Barack Obama. During my speech at our national convention in Denver, Colorado, I honored my mother, Catherine Finnegan Biden, who was there with us that night. My mother is no longer with us today, and I miss her dearly, but what I said about her in my speech in 2008 is more true today than ever before, and I hope you find inspiration in it:

_"My mother's creed is the American creed: No one is better than you. Everyone is your equal, and everyone is equal to you. My parents taught us to live our faith, and to treasure our families. We learned the dignity of work, and we were told that anyone can make it if they just try hard enough."_
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b679/1cd0ac28/1694962ce/357fcc9d/568115741/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b679/1cd0ac28/1694962ce/357fcc9c/568115741/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b679/1cd0ac28/1694962ce/357fcc9b/568115741/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b679/1cd0ac28/1694962ce/357fcc9a/568115741/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b679/1cd0ac28/1694962ce/357fcc99/568115741/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b679/1cd0ac28/1694962ce/357fcc98/568115741/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b679/1cd0ac28/1694962ce/357fcc97/568115741/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b679/1cd0ac28/1694962ce/357fcc96/568115741/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b679/1cd0ac28/1694962ce/357fcc95/568115741/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b679/1cd0ac28/1694962ce/357fcc94/568115741/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b679/1cd0ac28/1694962ce/357fcc97/568115741/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b679/1cd0ac28/1694962ce/357fcc93/568115741/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b679/1cd0ac28/1694962ce/357fcc96/568115741/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b679/1cd0ac28/1694962ce/357fcc92/568115741/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

body:
Updates from Kathy Manning, Democratic Candidate for NC-06 | |
---

[](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2b8/3d199a51/2fa289f1/7364b282/4029103446/VEsH/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.kathymanningfornc.com/")

|
---
|
---
| |
---
MESSAGE FROM KATHY
---
I hope you have enjoyed the virtual Democratic Convention as much as I have. From the amazing rendition of The Star Spangled Banner sung by young singers from every state to the roll call with people in magnificent locations from every state and territory, I have been inspired by the diversity, depth and beauty of our people and our land. We've heard amazing stories from ordinary Americans struggling to overcome the challenges of this difficult time. In a fitting celebration of the 100th anniversary of the ratification of the 19th Amendment, we've heard soaring speeches from remarkable women, including the straight-talking Michelle Obama, the powerful Speaker of the House, Nancy Pelosi, a resilient Hillary Clinton, and a gracious and determined Dr. Jill Biden. Best of all, the history-making speech of our future Vice President, Senator Kamala Harris, a fierce fighter who brings grace, intelligence, empathy and her life experience of being the first African American, East Asian woman ever nominated for Vice President. I can't wait to see the acceptance speech tonight of Joe Biden, the man with the empathy, intelligence, experience and determination to lead this country as we Build Back Better!

|

| HOW TO VOTE
---

Don't wait - request your absentee ballot now, and be sure to send it in early. The USPS sent out a letter in July stating that some states' mail-in ballot deadlines don't comport with the actual mail processing times. So let's not test the system; send those ballots in as early as possible!

**[Request an absentee ballot from Guilford County](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2b8/3d199a51/2fa289f1/7364b2ba/4029103446/VEsP/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.guilfordcountync.gov/our-county/board-of-elections/absentee-voting-information/absentee-by-mail-ballot") **or call the Guilford County Board of Elections for more information. Phone: (336) 641-3836 _**[Request an absentee ballot from Forsyth County](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2b8/3d199a51/2fa289f1/7364b2bb/4029103446/VEsHBQ/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.forsyth.cc/Elections/")**_ or call the Forsyth County Board of Elections for more information. clean_body: Updates from Kathy Manning, Democratic Candidate for NC-06 | | "" | | | | MESSAGE FROM KATHY I hope you have enjoyed the virtual Democratic Convention as much as I have. From the amazing rendition of The Star Spangled Banner sung by young singers from every state to the roll call with people in magnificent locations from every state and territory, I have been inspired by the diversity, depth and beauty of our people and our land. We've heard amazing stories from ordinary Americans struggling to overcome the challenges of this difficult time. In a fitting celebration of the 100th anniversary of the ratification of the 19th Amendment, we've heard soaring speeches from remarkable women, including the straight-talking Michelle Obama, the powerful Speaker of the House, Nancy Pelosi, a resilient Hillary Clinton, and a gracious and determined Dr. Jill Biden. Best of all, the history-making speech of our future Vice President, Senator Kamala Harris, a fierce fighter who brings grace, intelligence, empathy and her life experience of being the first African American, East Asian woman ever nominated for Vice President. name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Governor’s Emergency Education Relief Fund
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
The Governor’s Emergency Education Relief fund is evidence that Governor Holcomb and his team will continue to lead and do all that is necessary | |
---
| |
---|---|---
|
---
Friends,

Governor Holcomb continues to step up to support Hoosiers who need it most. And this week specifically it is our teachers and students both in K-12 and higher education who are heading back to school and need extra support to teach and learning during the ongoing pandemic. That’s why Governor Holcomb stepped in and made $61 million available via the Governor’s Emergency Education Relief Fund (GEERS).

One area that most of this grant will cover (**$49.8 million to be exact**) is devices and connectivity. We will see connectivity increase in the following ways:
* 68,689 student devices
* 2,885 teacher devices
* Internet access for households in need

The other **$11.2 million** is being poured into our colleges and universities _to help with educator training, support our students with special needs, and provide resources for online learning._

The Governor’s Emergency Education Relief fund is evidence that Governor Holcomb and his team will continue to lead and do all that is necessary to ensure Hoosiers across the state are receiving access to and support for the education they not only need, but, more importantly, _**deserve.**_

#BackonTrack,

-Your Holcomb Crew
---
---
|
|
| |

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Protecting our students' mental health
body:
RI COVID-19 Response Update: School Edition
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Since the start of the pandemic, we've heard from parents and pediatricians about the toll this crisis has taken on our kids. There's no question that distance learning has been incredibly hard on our kids' mental health. Sadly, we've seen big increases in anxiety and suicidal ideations since this pandemic started.
To learn more about how we can support kids as they go back to school, RIDE Commissioner Infante-Green and I spoke with Dr. Jennifer Jencks and Barbara Austin, licensed social workers and children's mental health experts at Bradley Hospital during today's Back to School forum.
You can watch the video of our conversation by clicking on the link below:
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TvuZN906UrX59dbSCXDzwytn4lIoH81RRJbd4-tNKUpGqzMrREPm4dFLIiGSLHEAZzv1iEGAueqcbR4EImNcQGUDx_bxGSb1a1EHh8d49b2gJMf5Sg7a1L50DWCsWs9ys15SdoOGHlaXl_jaVXo4F0qmDz5DTaEnsyHSQipdfL9irI2BU_Pa_k0yEIGaLXltCyB7dqPSJFU=&c=naV4-sQHaSmHeRl4LY9JnRjQPAW8ZMpbaGDsBb6zRi5LwnpqghjnzA==&ch=vrPdAAzRHTME78uIW8P5R0NQGtMMVKAYWHRuJvrZKIFgYLrwAejdDg==)
---
| You can also watch the video on [YouTube](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TvuZN906UrX59dbSCXDzwytn4lIoH81RRJbd4-tNKUpGqzMrREPm4buXfLSvfThNZ7TOK02oUW2eUXh36Z95vwlWyGFRHh5C54NVJsf29N-vbDyJr-U4X1m538VSloVql3w4l_je5pv6p00a474jlQ==&c=naV4-sQHaSmHeRl4LY9JnRjQPAW8ZMpbaGDsBb6zRi5LwnpqghjnzA==&ch=vrPdAAzRHTME78uIW8P5R0NQGtMMVKAYWHRuJvrZKIFgYLrwAejdDg==).
---
| We had a great discussion about how we can make the transition back to school easier for our kids. We talked about what kids of all ages need, from kindergarten to high school, and how to best talk to them about the virus. Most importantly, we answered some of the most frequently asked questions we've received over the last week. Thank you to the hundreds of Rhode Islanders who submitted questions.
As a reminder, if a child in your life is experiencing mental health issues, Kids' Link is available to you and your family 24/7 at 1-855-KID LINK (1-855-543-5465). Kids' Link is a hotline that families can call when their child is feeling excessive anger or sadness, lashing out, having severe worries, or hurting themselves or others. You are not alone. As we discussed today, many kids are suffering from feelings of depression and isolation right now. We are here to help you get through this. We're all in this together, -Gina Raimondo Governor
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TvuZN906UrX59dbSCXDzwytn4lIoH81RRJbd4-tNKUpGqzMrREPm4Y1xvO5qn1IldcbxwTYk14cVZYHWpQGyk0CxcAOdbH4SUSILuRKLee9Ab7vO3ZCrFnABhIydv2mCxNlwWCzmnHcyV4a3CpwnmOnJutF-asVLnZjO2531eYo4A6DquBKfzs9FflWElwXVaDgp1Pnf_eo=&c=naV4-sQHaSmHeRl4LY9JnRjQPAW8ZMpbaGDsBb6zRi5LwnpqghjnzA==&ch=vrPdAAzRHTME78uIW8P5R0NQGtMMVKAYWHRuJvrZKIFgYLrwAejdDg==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TvuZN906UrX59dbSCXDzwytn4lIoH81RRJbd4-tNKUpGqzMrREPm4Y1xvO5qn1IldcbxwTYk14cVZYHWpQGyk0CxcAOdbH4SUSILuRKLee9Ab7vO3ZCrFnABhIydv2mCxNlwWCzmnHcyV4a3CpwnmOnJutF-asVLnZjO2531eYo4A6DquBKfzs9FflWElwXVaDgp1Pnf_eo=&c=naV4-sQHaSmHeRl4LY9JnRjQPAW8ZMpbaGDsBb6zRi5LwnpqghjnzA==&ch=vrPdAAzRHTME78uIW8P5R0NQGtMMVKAYWHRuJvrZKIFgYLrwAejdDg==).

| P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TvuZN906UrX59dbSCXDzwytn4lIoH81RRJbd4-tNKUpGqzMrREPm4dFLIiGSLHEAxScg6pOqwU8Ygt4Grp8a3MoqJuBliY0wiKVE3xu1GWWuuzkHfvhs2XcgApvVK9gLENczaSSEc9tK0cRgOdmE4ldYk8YduCFBiDgKQLSN0RA0cUCOJKRkaYoyfq0DHADZsk5zAl4fq6Fx7ONPFR0a8-DFmcQoBGGB41ms_U-jqeVNg9na5UGdsI_LlIMnD_cKtRhMGh-ZFH04BAj0ew3Y8JF1bqGKlSOgldJvOTExIWcG4e3BMnsJ6aZ5Ie0i6a5cXt-IeakwVU0=&c=naV4-sQHaSmHeRl4LY9JnRjQPAW8ZMpbaGDsBb6zRi5LwnpqghjnzA==&ch=vrPdAAzRHTME78uIW8P5R0NQGtMMVKAYWHRuJvrZKIFgYLrwAejdDg==).

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Kamala Harris
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
I wish my paternal grandfather, who immigrated to the U.S. from Kingston, Jamaica, could see this moment. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zdovuQh6AnzseedbOztB5U3N720NDadj7zRuigSklZR64H8zQAM4N-NSGDKwaWeqxKEIpP8QaP3wV1dh6iS3qXjCdrtIVPhKJrlDfURW7F3sKmCG7TSlvWgb8v4-kaentgOuVw2woMF1w9ve13K3juKj4wFvCWAFTkEk-vMkOa37n1VNAyzbHJU1xUglPpVbVBGnSk_e9HU74Y-_0k7fRcVI_wtiUKB_0dk6DX6CUq6f0q9DW91IHLebpxOqJsi0LAqQ2caOGCipTNp5Y92UJwVv5qfiyih6D0LpVJHH3XaZbiOBOelKYtOYBx-5YtWRgTfp-LZbVvcT2Rbke6HsXhhKq-Orqfk3eXinOfOyMGhQ/34h/rEmiNaZ9Sp-GWBmCQXPxVA/h0/wr8Y7LJDgat41sgKO57kUgsmehtCL1C3EiGTvxDt8go) **Just like Kamala Harris is making history as the first Black and Asian-American woman nominated for Vice President by a major party, Mondaire will make history as one of the first openly gay, Black men ever elected to Congress.** **[Help Mondaire make history by making a donation to our campaign today.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zdovuQh6AnzseedbOztB5U3N720NDadj7zRuigSklZR64H8zQAM4N-NSGDKwaWeqyxoXERH05km7v4Ksne-VTzbnAyttrEyHx93MFLhs4C5zS_6-rdDASliHy8q3t9eaq2EbhEDJhhZSQLIRKPnhyOgqZzN5lTTNDFPTvMH2gBtseFV3Lh5sL0eaP_5N8D6hJu3w9mtlQ4k97Ejpp68un_LhtHlqCv5boJ-SdE3cBEB7j5GCkbtaHlM-_K3V321m1w8Dm0FY0VnsUFpHfOfOTphOQCPZMfSVkrW_s8CfzJ2TJGD4g8j2QbGH7SuqCPQyWwYc2jNV8pX3WBJZkLwdNwVRg-lKxwH35MJlP0Gf-6Vw/34h/rEmiNaZ9Sp-GWBmCQXPxVA/h1/9AESRtnjJrGyQ1jL_kv-42JuCW1qUxepYy2KYu2jYO8)** [DONATE](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zdovuQh6AnzseedbOztB5U3N720NDadj7zRuigSklZR64H8zQAM4N-NSGDKwaWeqyEeDbfLy_pyC4iuSM9zY-LU-V2HCchydXOaKnFh7hmRzvCXI2cvlBn8vU4yVzt8-sWFPZKUmDRXHhlHg06QJ3ties4De67voDrSi-0Diy3Wrh-S87Heq4VVr_KgOPuTrh1zs_1_byegR_qHAg31m1I2ZsWMwM6C3j9BhSE9JaH76UTT9AAMiHBYgkQweC7kqNOI4-1oJnl2IiroMSRJIPgpFsoGD7MsU-PlKKzmcinqEwQCYOX5J4XxZKKAsS4QBHYbGEyxvHu-ixdI6_vOHwEcr34krpeyvZy-K3Fgduh8w/34h/rEmiNaZ9Sp-GWBmCQXPxVA/h2/SL6Edm68h1QU6tlj6SSKyLUmoZWiv4IVM5_XklEWq90)
Friends, Last night, I was deeply moved watching Senator Kamala Harris, the daughter of Jamaican and Indian immigrants, formally accept the Democratic Party’s nomination for Vice President. I wish my paternal grandfather, who immigrated to the U.S. from Kingston, Jamaica, could have seen that historic moment. Regardless of who you might have favored as a VP pick, to see a Black woman be nominated for the second-highest office in America is a big deal. Black and Brown kids got to see something last night that I didn’t think was in the realm of possibility as a kid. And I know that Kamala’s nomination will inspire them to dream big. Growing up, I did not see people like me in positions of power or influence — certainly not in public office. Instead I watched as opportunistic, straight politicians — mostly white, nearly all men — used the basic human rights of Black and LGBTQ+ people as a political football to further their careers. As a kid struggling with self-acceptance and agonizingly afraid of how others would perceive me if they learned the truth, life would have been much easier had I been able to see someone like me in the halls of Congress. It would have given me hope that everything would one day be okay, that I did not have to hide or cry so much, and that one day society would judge me based on the content of my character rather than who I loved. I know from the messages I receive nearly every day from across the country that our campaign is giving other Black, LGBTQ+ kids like I was the permission to be out and proud and ambitious. I know that Kamala’s candidacy is doing the same for young Black and Brown girls. Representation matters. Please join me in the next 75 days in doing everything you can to defeat Donald Trump and elect candidates who will change the composition of Congress to better represent we, the people. clean_body: I wish my paternal grandfather, who immigrated to the U.S. from Kingston, Jamaica, could see this moment. | | | Just like Kamala Harris is making history as the first Black and Asian-American woman nominated for Vice President by a major party, Mondaire will make history as one of the first openly gay, Black men ever elected to Congress. Friends, Last night, I was deeply moved watching Senator Kamala Harris, the daughter of Jamaican and Indian immigrants, formally accept the Democratic Party’s nomination for Vice President. I wish my paternal grandfather, who immigrated to the U.S. from Kingston, Jamaica, could have seen that historic moment. Regardless of who you might have favored as a VP pick, to see a Black woman be nominated for the second-highest office in America is a big deal. Black and Brown kids got to see something last night that I didn’t think was in the realm of possibility as a kid. And I know that Kamala’s nomination will inspire them to dream big. Growing up, I did not see people like me in positions of power or influence — certainly not in public office. Instead I watched as opportunistic, straight politicians — mostly white, nearly all men — used the basic human rights of Black and LGBTQ+ people as a political football to further their careers. As a kid struggling with self-acceptance and agonizingly afraid of how others would perceive me if they learned the truth, life would have been much easier had I been able to see someone like me in the halls of Congress. It would have given me hope that everything would one day be okay, that I did not have to hide or cry so much, and that one day society would judge me based on the content of my character rather than who I loved. I know from the messages I receive nearly every day from across the country that our campaign is giving other Black, LGBTQ+ kids like I was the permission to be out and proud and ambitious. I know that Kamala’s candidacy is doing the same for young Black and Brown girls. Representation matters. Please join me in the next 75 days in doing everything you can to defeat Donald Trump and elect candidates who will change the composition of Congress to better represent we, the people. Onward, Mondaire Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Our mailing address is: Mondaire for Congress P.O. Box 933, Nyack, NY 10960 | | | | Sent via . name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: NEW: President Trump issues joint statement with Prime Minister of Iraq
body:
President Trump welcomed Prime Minister Mustafa Al-Kadhimi of Iraq to the White House today—the Iraqi leader’s first visit since assuming office... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ce541a55b0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • August 20, 2020
---
| | |
# **NEW: President Trump issues joint statement with Prime Minister of Iraq**

**President Trump welcomed** Prime Minister Mustafa Al-Kadhimi of Iraq to the White House today—the Iraqi leader’s first visit since assuming office in May.

“**We’re down to a very small** number of soldiers in Iraq now. We defeated the ISIS caliphate in Iraq and Syria,” President Trump said. “I think our relationship [with Iraq] now is better than ever before.”

🎬 [**President Trump: “We knocked out 100 percent of the ISIS caliphate.”**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3745802327&e=3ee4985eea)

**America is leading** the way to a more peaceful and prosperous Middle East—without fighting endless wars and without making terrible deals that harm our national security.

**Just last week** , President Trump secured a landmark agreement between Israel and the United Arab Emirates, as the UAE became the first major Arab country to recognize Israel in over a quarter-century.

**Elsewhere in the Middle East** , while the disastrous Obama nuclear deal funneled billions of dollars to Iran—the world’s number one state sponsor of terror—President Trump’s maximum-pressure campaign is isolating and crippling the Iranian regime.

**“Iran doesn’t have so much** money to give to the world anymore—to the terrorists, to give to al Qaeda and various other groups of people that they were funding,” President Trump said. “They have to keep their own regime together, and it’s not easy for them.”

**Like Ronald Reagan, “** peace through strength” is President Trump’s approach to foreign policy. [**“Peace through stability”**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a1356f72d4&e=3ee4985eea) is another way to put it, Daniel McCarthy writes in _The American Conservative_ this week.

**“Bush’s war** and Obama’s idea of peace both built-up Iranian power,” McCarthy says. “Donald Trump can succeed where the others fail because he is transactional, not ideological, and he looks out for the American interest.”

🎬 [**President Trump is bringing our great American soldiers home!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cb8754de56&e=3ee4985eea)

**📖 READ:**[**Joint Statement from President Trump and Iraqi Prime Minister**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=74b8f664bc&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Before President Trump, America witnessed the slowest ‘recovery’ in decades **
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dacc57dd18&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **“We inherited** the worst, slowest economic recovery since, I don’t know, probably the Great Depression,” National Economic Council Director Larry Kudlow said today.

**“In 2016 . . . the economy** was teetering very close to recession,” he added. Then, President Trump’s “policies of low taxes, deregulation, unleashing energy, free- and fair-trade deals to improve exports for manufactures and farmers—those policies generated a tremendous boom.” Unemployment plummeted to 3.5 percent as a result.

**Now, the Great American Comeback** from COVID-19 is already underway. Last week, President Trump shared six graphs that reveal the fastest recovery in history:
1. [Jobs Boom in Full Swing](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0d5cdbb597&e=3ee4985eea)
2. [Manufacturing Boom in Full Swing](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9b9775c273&e=3ee4985eea)
3. [Auto Market Showing Rapid Recovery](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f1e7a2782c&e=3ee4985eea)
4. [Housing Market Quickly Rebounds](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cc411b1eb&e=3ee4985eea)
5. [U.S. Stocks Lead the World](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5721560e32&e=3ee4985eea)
6. [Shallowest Contraction](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3aabba61ab&e=3ee4985eea)

---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump boards Air Force One before departing for Pennsylvania** | August 20, 2020
---
|

---

| | I am proud to announce that Congressman Sean Casten has endorsed my campaign for Congress in IL-16! **Congressman Casten knows what it takes to win in a district that has been held by Republicans for decades, and he knows that I have what it takes to flip this seat.**

Sean Casten is fighting for our values in Congress by standing up for working families and protecting healthcare. I can't wait to work with him on legislation to improve the lives of people here in northern Illinois,**but in order to get there, I need your help.[Can I count on you to chip in and help send me to Washington with Sean?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=052a9796b9&e=140a9b81e7)**

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Peter, have you seen Hunter Biden?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
The Chinese Communist Party is putting religious minorities in concentration camps, waging cyberwar against America, and stealing our intellectual property. And earlier this year, they unleashed the China Virus on the world.
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMyNTM3NDgS1&kn=5&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMTY2OTEzMgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter,

For months, I have been warning you about the growing national security threat from China.

The Chinese Communist Party is putting religious minorities in concentration camps, waging cyberwar against America, and stealing our intellectual property. And earlier this year, they unleashed the China Virus on the world.

President Trump has stood firm against China and we need to do everything we can to re-elect him in November.

**But electing Joe Biden would be surrendering to the Chinese Communist Party. **

[**Stop Joe Biden >>> Donate Now**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMyNTM3NDgS1&kn=13&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMTY2OTEzMgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

It is not just that Joe Biden is weak in standing up to Communist China--**his corrupt son Hunter is embroiled in a Chinese scandal that the mainstream media wants you to ignore.**

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMyNTM3NDgS1&kn=2&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMTY2OTEzMgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

our democracy is on the line |

Friend,

Last night, President Barack Obama gave a sober warning to the nation about the stakes of this election.

**"This administration has shown it will _tear our democracy down_ if that's what it takes to win," he said.**

**"So we have to get busy building it up."**

_Friend, we have no time to waste._

Our government is run by a president and crew of gutless puppets who have utterly failed to contain an outbreak that has killed 170,000 Americans and enabled this corrupt president as he lies, cheats, and enriches his own family.

We have just one chance to change course, and it's _this election_.

**As President Obama said, our democracy is our power.**

We have 75 days left to put in the work necessary to win and end this dark chapter in our history.

**[Please join me in standing for democracy, for decency, and for the people.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2511/5b2c1286/3f4ede76/25f04d46/3545807101/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_20_jo_bo?refcode=em_2020_08_20_jo_bo&amount=20")**

**Friend, President Obama once again showed us true leadership.**

America deserves leaders we can trust, who care about us, who put our interests above their own.

**Joe and Kamala won't be able to fully realize that vision without a majority in the Senate.**

**We're entering the home stretch. This Senate race in Georgia is all tied up. The GOP is pouring in their limitless resources to save Senator David Perdue, but we have the momentum.**

Cornyn?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e14/7f51f7bc/43375b8f/4ef7d253/2295866608/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NTEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200820.3nd__1951__&amount=10")** Leah Lacure
Digital Director
MJ for Texas \---------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: **MJ Hegar**
Subject: It's on us
> Hey Peter,
>
> I'm reaching out personally because my Texas finance director tells me we're still a bit behind on donations from your community. It's incredibly important to me that we get on track to meet our goal for the day. 26 donations should be an attainable number for your area, and I wanted to make sure you knew that **[I am counting on you to help us get there.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e14/7f51f7bc/43375b8f/4ef7d253/2295866608/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NTEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200820.3nd__1951__&amount=10")**
>
> We can beat Sen. Cornyn this November -- less than three months from now -- but it's going to take a lot of work to overcome all of his special interest and corporate PAC money. People are rushing to help Mitch McConnell's right hand man, and that's why your donation today means so much to me. **[Do you have my back?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e14/7f51f7bc/43375b8f/4ef7d253/2295866608/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NTEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200820.3nd__1951__&amount=10")** \-- MJ
>
> | [DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e14/7f51f7bc/43375b8f/4ef7d253/2295866608/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NTEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200820.3nd__1951__&amount=10")
> ---
>

|

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e14/7f51f7bc/43375b8f/4ef7d252/2295866608/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NTEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1951&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e14/7f51f7bc/43375b8f/4ef7d251/2295866608/VEsB/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
